stories.title: Follow live: Trio of goals has England cruising in...
Burns holds Open lead; Fox, Kim two shots back
stories.summary: Two weeks after the birth of his daughter, Sam Burns finds himself atop the Open Championship leaderboard with a two-shot lead heading into Sunday's final round at Royal Birkdale.

stories.title: Source: O's sign RHP Bradish to $90M extension
stories.summary: The Orioles have agreed to a five-year extension with starting pitcher Kyle Bradish, a deal worth $90 million, a source told ESPN's Jeff Passan.

stories.title: Blackhawks, Bedard agree to 5-year, $75M deal
stories.summary: Chicago Blackhawks star Connor Bedard has agreed to a $75 million, five-year contract, completing a major offseason goal for the team.

stories.title: Brondello regrets Reese comment, apologizes
stories.summary: Tempo coach Sandy Brondello apologized to Angel Reese after being heard referring to Reese with a phrase that sounded like "protected species" to officials during a game Friday.
